89: export class DatabaseStorage implements IStorage {
90:   async getUsers() {
91:     return await db.select().from(users).where(eq(users.isActive, true));
92:   }
93: 
94:   async createUser(user: { username: string; password: string; role: string; fullName?: string }) {
95:     const [created] = await db.insert(users).values({
96:       username: user.username,
97:       password: user.password,
98:       role: user.role,
99:       fullName: user.fullName || null,
100:       isActive: true,
101:     }).returning();
102:     return created;
103:   }
104: 
105:   async getAllUserProfiles() {
106:     return await db.select().from(userProfiles);
107:   }
108: 
109:   async getUserProfile(userId: number) {
110:     const [profile] = await db.select().from(userProfiles).where(eq(userProfiles.userId, userId));
111:     return profile || null;
112:   }
113: 
114:   async createOrUpdateUserProfile(data: InsertUserProfile) {
115:     const existing = await db.select().from(userProfiles).where(eq(userProfiles.userId, data.userId));
116:     
117:     if (existing.length > 0) {
118:       const [updated] = await db.update(userProfiles)
119:         .set({ ...data, updatedAt: new Date() })
120:         .where(eq(userProfiles.userId, data.userId))
121:         .returning();
122:       return updated;
123:     } else {
124:       const [created] = await db.insert(userProfiles).values(data).returning();
125:       return created;
126:     }
127:   }
128: 
129:   async lockUserProfile(userId: number) {
130:     await db.update(userProfiles)
131:       .set({ isLocked: true, updatedAt: new Date() })
132:       .where(eq(userProfiles.userId, userId));
133:   }
134: 
135:   async generateDailyQRCode() {
136:     const today = new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0];
137:     const qrCode = `ATT-${today}-${Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 8).toUpperCase()}`;
138:     const existing = await db.select().from(dailyQRCodes).where(eq(dailyQRCodes.date, today));
139:     if (existing.length > 0) {
140:       return existing[0];
141:     }
142:     const [created] = await db.insert(dailyQRCodes).values({ date: today, qrCode }).returning();
143:     return created;
144:   }
145: 
146:   async getTodayQRCode() {
147:     const today = new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0];
148:     const [code] = await db.select().from(dailyQRCodes).where(eq(dailyQRCodes.date, today));
149:     if (!code) {
150:       return this.generateDailyQRCode();
151:     }
152:     return code;
153:   }
154: 
155:   async regenerateDailyQRCode() {
156:     const today = new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0];
157:     const qrCode = `ATT-${today}-${Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 8).toUpperCase()}`;
158:     const existing = await db.select().from(dailyQRCodes).where(eq(dailyQRCodes.date, today));
159:     if (existing.length > 0) {
160:       const [updated] = await db.update(dailyQRCodes)
161:         .set({ qrCode, createdAt: new Date() })
162:         .where(eq(dailyQRCodes.date, today))
163:         .returning();
164:       return updated;
165:     }
166:     const [created] = await db.insert(dailyQRCodes).values({ date: today, qrCode }).returning();
167:     return created;
168:   }
169: 
170:   async getQrEnabled() {
171:     const setting = await this.getSetting("attendance_qr_enabled");
172:     return setting?.value === "true";
173:   }
174: 
175:   async setQrEnabled(enabled: boolean) {
176:     await this.setSetting("attendance_qr_enabled", enabled ? "true" : "false");
177:   }
178: 
179:   async checkIn(userId: number, qrCode: string) {
180:     const today = new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0];
181:     const existing = await db.select().from(attendanceRecords).where(
182:       and(eq(attendanceRecords.userId, userId), eq(attendanceRecords.date, today))
183:     );
184:     if (existing.length > 0) {
185:       return null;
186:     }
187:     const [created] = await db.insert(attendanceRecords).values({
188:       userId,
189:       date: today,
190:       qrCode,
191:       checkIn: new Date(),
192:       status: "checked_in",
193:     }).returning();
194:     return created;
195:   }
196: 
197:   async checkOut(userId: number, qrCode: string) {
198:     const today = new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0];
199:     const [existing] = await db.select().from(attendanceRecords).where(
200:       and(eq(attendanceRecords.userId, userId), eq(attendanceRecords.date, today), eq(attendanceRecords.status, "checked_in"))
201:     );
202:     if (!existing) return null;
203:     
204:     const checkInTime = new Date(existing.checkIn!);
205:     const checkOutTime = new Date();
206:     const totalMs = checkOutTime.getTime() - checkInTime.getTime();
207:     const totalHours = Math.round(totalMs / (1000 * 60 * 60) * 100) / 100;
208:     
209:     const [updated] = await db.update(attendanceRecords)
210:       .set({ checkOut: checkOutTime, totalHours: Math.floor(totalHours * 100), status: "checked_out" })
211:       .where(eq(attendanceRecords.id, existing.id))
212:       .returning();
213:     return updated;
214:   }
215: 
216:   async getAttendanceByUser(userId: number) {
217:     return await db.select().from(attendanceRecords).where(eq(attendanceRecords.userId, userId)).orderBy(desc(attendanceRecords.date));
218:   }
